nodes.title: The PM Group’s Full Service Advertising Agency Offerings are the Driving Force Behind Our Client Growth

pageContext.content:
The Fed’s and the San Antonio Express-News report 10 Years of Meteoric Employment Growth
It comes as no surprise that the San Antonio & South Texas area is booming. Everywhere you look you’ll see new housing construction, highway expansion, new business openings and retail centers filled with customers. No wonder we have experienced a job market that has added 201,000 jobs in the last 10 years—a 26% increase since 2005.
While many northeast and rust belt states have seen their area employment rolls shrink drastically, San Antonio and Texas are experiencing an enviable economic growth.
Of course, with great growth comes great opportunity! As San Antonio’s largest advertising agency, The PM Group is best known for being the business development leader. Our business growth philosophies, strategies and approach have helped businesses big & small exceed.
“Advertising is not art, its commerce. When it comes to advertising and marketing any business, it is the execution of sound decision making– based upon real world consumer perceptions. Too often, brands look at their business through the eyes of the business. When in fact, the best results come from looking at the business through the eyes of the targeted customer,” states PM Group founder and CEO, Bob Wills. “You have to first admit that if all research was correct, every business would be tied for number one. The ability to see opportunity through all the relevant and irrelevant facts is paramount,” he added.
If your business is looking for better revenues & profits in a booming era, call The PM Group and let’s get started!
ABOUT THE PM GROUP
The PM Group is a full service advertising agency representing many of San Antonio’s finest brands like; the San Antonio Spurs, SWBC, IHOP restaurants, Thomas J Henry Injury Attorneys, Stowers Furniture, Texas Orthodontics, San Antonio Shoemakers, Blue Haven Pools, C.H. Guenther & Pioneer Brands, the American Payroll Association, Six Flags Fiesta Texas, KFC, ChildSafe, SA Pets Alive, the San Antonio Auto Show, the BOOK of FREE, Big League Weekend, Too Good to Be Threw, A&E Air Conditioning & Heating, Twin Aviation and Taco Bell.
The Agency was just recognized by the San Antonio Business Journal as the largest advertising agency in San Antonio.
Not to be lost in the overall success of the Agency, is our partnership and commitment to the community. The PM Group and its affiliated businesses have given over $1.1 million dollars to local charities & non-profits in the past five years. Giving back pays thanks for the success we have enjoyed…..for gratitude is the greatest of all virtues.
